briefings.title: Daily Financial Briefing
briefings.marketTone: CPI relief meets oil overhang — June inflation missed everywhere (core 2.6% y/y vs ~2.9% consensus), yields fell and futures turned up, but Brent >$86 and Warsh testimony keep hike anxiety alive.

briefings.title: Daily Financial Briefing
briefings.marketTone: Risk-off — Middle East escalation reprices oil, inflation, and Fed policy; semiconductors under pressure despite AI narrative.
